close_reason: Won't add to umbrella: this is a downstream consumer of SigningBackend, not a backend. Documented the relationship in both README.md and crate-level doc instead.
description: secretx-signature is not included in secretx/Cargo.toml as an optional dependency and has no corresponding feature flag. Every other backend crate (secretx-local-signing, secretx-aws-kms, secretx-pkcs11, secretx-wolfhsm, etc.) is accessible via the umbrella crate with a matching feature flag. Users who want to use secretx-signature must depend on it directly and cannot discover it through the umbrella crate's feature list. Affected files: secretx/Cargo.toml, secretx/src/lib.rs.
title: secretx-signature missing from umbrella crate
